perspectives.label: Societal
perspectives.objective: all specified costs and outcomes from a societal view

perspectives.label: Patient
perspectives.objective: patient costs, burden, and patient-valued outcomes

perspectives.label: Provider
perspectives.objective: provider resource use and provider-valued outcomes

perspectives.label: Regulator
perspectives.objective: regulatory outcomes, safety, and budget impact

assumptions.perspective_weights: Weights represent uncertainty over which perspective should govern the decision and are normalized before aggregation.
assumptions.objective_uncertainty: Each perspective supplies its own net-benefit surface; the method values resolving which surface should govern the choice.
assumptions.real_data_boundary: Real observations must be mapped to a named perspective with a documented cost/effect transform; no such mapping is claimed by this catalog.
